MENU_RESET_WARNING_DESC: Warning! Starting a New Game will permanently erase all your custom structures, inventory stacks, and active campaign progress on disk. This action is irreversible.
LOADING_TIP: Gameplay Tip: Hold 'Left Alt' to release your hardware mouse cursor, allowing you to click the backpack or crafting shortcut buttons at any time.
LOADING_UNLOAD_WORLD: Saving chunks and returning to menu...
INVENTORY_EMPTY_DESC: Click or Drag any backpack item to inspect its capabilities, equip it, or reorganize your storage layout.
INVENTORY_COMPACTED_DESC: All duplicated material stacks merged and sorted successfully!
ITEM_1_DESC: A heavy, solid building block carved from deep crusts. Excellent for constructing durable shelters, towers, and structural fortresses.
ITEM_1_USE: Equip to Hand. Aim at a solid block and Right-Click (or Q) to place it.
ITEM_2_DESC: Rich, loose brown soil. The primary organic block of the flat plains. Ideal for molding landscapes or building simple soil ramparts.
ITEM_2_USE: Equip to Hand. Aim at a solid block and Right-Click (or Q) to place it.
ITEM_3_DESC: Vibrant grass turf. Over time, grass blocks spread organically onto adjacent dirt blocks under sunlight, turning cold dirt into lush plains.
ITEM_3_USE: Equip to Hand. Aim at a solid block and Right-Click (or Q) to place it.
ITEM_4_DESC: Solid oak wood logs chopped from tall forest canopies. A highly versatile structural material and the backbone of most recipe blueprints.
ITEM_4_USE: Equip to Hand. Aim at a solid block and Right-Click (or Q) to place it.
ITEM_5_DESC: Soft, packed leafy foliage. Ideal for building lightweight, organic structures like thatched roofs, rustic hedges, or compost piles.
ITEM_5_USE: Equip to Hand. Aim at a solid block and Right-Click (or Q) to place it.
ITEM_15_DESC: A bucket of highly volatile, glowing geothermal magma. Extremely dangerous if touched. Used primarily as reactor fuel for high-tier crafts.
ITEM_15_USE: Equip to Hand. Right-Click to pour flowing lava, or Right-Click on the Village Merchant to trade for food rations.
ITEM_16_DESC: Delicious chicken crisped to golden perfection over hot geothermal lava. Highly therapeutic, smelling amazing and warm.
ITEM_16_USE: Click CONSUME FOOD to instantly eat it and restore 1 Heart (❤), or use Right-Click while equipped.
ITEM_17_DESC: A basic training broadsword carved from solid oak logs. It has infinite durability. Perfect for protecting the village plains against monsters.
ITEM_17_USE: Equip to Hand. Aim at a cave zombie and Left-Click (or E) to swing and attack.
ITEM_18_DESC: Plump wheat seeds gathered from forestry foliage. Can be planted on any fertile tilled soil or soft grass block to start your own crops.
ITEM_18_USE: Equip to Hand. Aim at the top face of a Grass or Dirt block and Right-Click (or Q) to sow. Crops grow dynamically over time!
ITEM_20_DESC: Golden, sun-ripened wheat grains harvested from your mature crop fields. Essential raw material for elite survival baking recipes.
ITEM_20_USE: Crafting Material. Open the Blueprint Workshop (C) to fabricate valuable emergency rations.
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_INTRO: Greetings, traveler! I am the Golden Bazaar's lead vendor. My furnace runs night and day, but I am desperately out of geothermal fuel. If you bring me a bucket of hot Lava, I will trade you my premium double-crispy Fried Chicken!
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_ABOUT: I have spent decades traveling across these biomes. From the icy cliffs of Frostbite Glaciers to the cyan-glowing conduits of Neon Ruins, there is no market I haven't bartered in. But the Golden Bazaar plains are my home. Here, the soil is rich, and the wheat is plentiful!
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_TRADE_INFO:
Our trade is simple and fair:

GIVE: 1x Volatile Lava Bucket (Hold key 6)
RECEIVE: 1x Crispy Fried Chicken

Lava fuel allows me to keep the fryer blazing for the villagers!
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_TRADE_FAILED: Inquisitive hum... It seems you are not holding a Lava Bucket in your hand. Select your Lava Bucket (Slot 6) and Right-Click me to trade!
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_TRADE_SUCCESS: Excited hum! That lava is burning perfectly! *Hops in the air with physical joy* Here is your hot, crispy Fried Chicken. Safe travels, friend!
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_TRADE_QUEST_COMPLETE: Magnificent! This lava fuel is exactly what my bakery needed! *Hops with joy* Our partnership has successfully completed your training mission. Excellent work, adventurer!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_QUEST_COMPLETE: Oh! You found us! We were beginning to think no one would cross the Bay of Sails to reach the Golden Bazaar. Welcome to our plains! Your arrival successfully completes your exploration quest. Talk to the Merchant next to start trading!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_NIGHT: Shh... It is dark. Cave zombies roam the grasslands at night. Be careful!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_OCEAN: Ah, the sea breeze of the Bay of Sails! Perfect for sailing.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_GLACIERS: Brr... It's freezing up here. My parkas are barely holding the cold!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_NEON: These cyan structures are radiating high-energy data blocks. Remarkable...
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_SWAMP: The mud in this Swamp of Sighs is thick, but the local mushrooms are great for alchemy.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_CLOUD: We are floating so high! The clouds are incredibly soft to walk on.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_PLAINS_A: Our farmers are working hard to sow seeds and harvest wheat for the bakery.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_PLAINS_B: Have you seen the Grand Stone Castle? It's a massive structure further east!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_PLAINS_C: If you are hurt, eat some Fried Chicken. It heals you instantly!
DIALOGUE_GUARD_NIGHT: Stay behind my shield! I will cut down any cave zombie that approaches.
DIALOGUE_GUARD_GLACIERS: My steel-plated armor is cold, but my sword is sharp. No frost giants are getting past me.
DIALOGUE_GUARD_NEON: Detecting high-frequency cybernetic signatures... Security levels normal.
DIALOGUE_GUARD_PLAINS_A: I patrol the village borders to ensure the safety of our farmers and traders.
DIALOGUE_GUARD_PLAINS_B: If you hold a Wooden Sword, Left-Click to attack. It will push monsters back with knockback!
DIALOGUE_FARMER_NIGHT: Our fields are too dark to work safely at night. Time to rest.
DIALOGUE_FARMER_GLACIERS: Growing crops on frozen ice shelves is hard work, but we manage!
DIALOGUE_FARMER_NEON: These glowing cyan paths seem to accelerate crop photosynthesis!
DIALOGUE_FARMER_PLAINS_A: When wheat turns golden, it is ready. Harvest it to get both wheat grains and seeds!
DIALOGUE_FARMER_PLAINS_B: Sow seeds on fertile grass or dirt. Always keep them hydrated near water canals!
DIALOGUE_MINER_NIGHT: Deep inside these peaks, there is no difference between day and night!
DIALOGUE_MINER_PLAINS_A: We mine deep stone crusts and coal ores to supply the blacksmiths.
DIALOGUE_MINER_PLAINS_B: Watch your step! Falling down a deep ravine is a fast way to get hurt.
DIALOGUE_CYBER_NIGHT: Night cycle initiated. starfield coordinates synchronized.
DIALOGUE_CYBER_PLAINS_A: Circuitry efficiency levels at 98.4%. Processing procedural calculations.
DIALOGUE_CYBER_PLAINS_B: Welcome to the Cyber Basin. Mind the neon conduits.
DIALOGUE_DRUID_NIGHT: The forest is quiet. Even the redwood leaves seem to sleep.
DIALOGUE_DRUID_PLAINS_A: We protect the ancient Giant Redwoods. Their mossy canopies hold deep magic.
DIALOGUE_DRUID_PLAINS_B: The forest druids can brew miraculous poultices from simple leaves.
NOTIFICATION_HARVEST_SUCCESS_DESC: You successfully harvested mature wheat, gathering grains and seeds.
NOTIFICATION_CROP_UPROOTED_DESC: The young sprout was uprooted, recovering the seed.
NOTIFICATION_PLANTED_SEED_DESC: Sowed crop seed on fertile soil. It will grow over time!
NOTIFICATION_CONSUME_FOOD_DESC: Restored 1 Heart! Keep your health high to survive.
NOTIFICATION_LOOT_FOUND_DESC_CHICKEN: Discovered 1x Fried Chicken inside the chest!
NOTIFICATION_LOOT_FOUND_DESC_LAVA: Discovered 1x Lava Bucket inside the chest!
QUEST_REACHED_INTERACT: Target Reached! Talk to the Inhabitant.
lost_bazaar_desc: Find the Golden Bazaar settlement located in the eastern plains.
thatch_roof_desc: Gather leaves from the nearby forest canopies.
coarse_foundations_desc: Mine stone blocks to build a sturdy foundation for your house.
fuel_fryer_desc: The Merchant needs lava to fry his chickens. Give him 1x Lava Bucket.
fuel_fryer_obj: Right-Click the Merchant holding a Lava Bucket
plains_defender_desc: A cave zombie is approaching the village! Defeat it to protect the plains.
plains_defender_obj: Find and defeat the Zombie outside the gates
cloud_ascent_desc: Build a tower block by block straight up into the sky.
frozen_spire_desc: Cross the threshold of the far North Polar Glaciers and locate the majestic Frozen Ice Spire. It is a massive spired tower constructed entirely of blue ice blocks.
frozen_spire_obj: Scale to the top of the Glacial Ice Spire
polar_forager_desc: The freezing blizzards are brutal on your body. Hunt wild polar animals or defeat frozen zombies to stockpile food rations.
polar_forager_obj: Amass 5x Fried Chickens in your inventory
red_badlands_desc: Embark on a massive trek far South, leaving the polar glaciers behind. Discover the deep terracotta steps of the Red Sandstone Canyons.
red_badlands_obj: Trek deep into the southern red canyons
neon_pyramid_desc: Travel West into the dark cybernetic Neon Ruins crater and locate the glowing Neon Pyramid pinnacle.
neon_pyramid_obj: Discover the glowing Neon Ruins Pyramid
cyber_hacker_desc: Hack the ancient network! Collect cybernetic grass blocks from the glowing obsidian soil to build a digital link.
cyber_hacker_obj: Gather 32x Grass Blocks in the ruins
neon_shards_desc: Secure structural obsidian components. Mine stone from the deep technological crater.
neon_shards_obj: Mine and collect 16x Stone Blocks in the ruins
swamp_recon_desc: Trek back to the murky Swamp of Sighs. Deliver construction supplies to the deep mud research outpost.
swamp_recon_obj: Reach the abandoned swamp outpost coordinates
lava_feast_desc: Voxel construction is unlimited, but the final sky climb requires maximum energy. Prepare a grand deep-fried feast.
cloud_scout_desc: Walk among the fluffy, semi-transparent white cloud blocks and locate the highest celestial peak of the kingdom.
cloud_scout_obj: Reach the highest floating cloud isle peak
bazaar_return_desc: You have conquered the infinite world, the depths and the sky. Make the final journey back to the plains village to report your cosmic discoveries to the Villager.
bazaar_return_obj: Trek back and speak to the Villager at the Bazaar
